name: Risi e Bisi
recipeIngredient: 2 Ounces Prosciutto di San Daniele, diced into 1/8 inch pieces
2 Pounds fresh peas, shelled, yielding 1 1/2 Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a deep-sided frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add shallots, celery, and prosciutto; cook until soft but not brown, about 8 to 10 minutes.
3. Stir in rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the rice becomes almost opaque.
4. Gradually add warm chicken stock, one ladle at a time, ensuring the rice remains covered.
5. Continue adding stock and stir constantly until all liquid is absorbed and the rice is soft and creamy but still al dente.
6. Add peas; cook until the rice is fully cooked and tender.
7. Remove from heat; stir in butter and cheese. Adjust seasoning as needed.
8. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
